_comment: Art generated by the .github/workflows/generate-art.yml pipeline via tools/fetch-art.mjs. It fetches each entry from Pollinations (free, no key) and commits the PNGs. Seeds are pinned so re-runs are reproducible; existing files are skipped (use --force to regenerate). The story games load these by convention (art/<id>-cover.png) and fall back to the built-in SVG art if a file is missing. Style is kept soft, painterly and child-friendly.
styleSuffix: , soft painterly digital illustration, children's storybook art, warm gentle lighting, cute, no text, no words

images.prompt: a cute friendly baby dragon and a little princess girl in a sunny flower meadow with a big rainbow and a castle
a cozy family campsite at night, a glowing orange campfire, a tent and tall pine trees under a starry sky
a friendly cartoon rocket ship flying through colourful outer space toward a planet made of pizza, stars and planets
a bright blocky voxel sandbox world of grassy cube hills, cube trees and a pixel sun, cheerful adventure
a magical glowing library with tall wooden bookshelves and floating sparkling books, cozy and wondrous
a cute friendly smiling little ghost floating beside a happy girl in a moonlit castle hall, gentle and not scary
a fun friendly midnight costume party, cheerful kids in cute Halloween costumes outside a castle, lanterns, not scary
a cute tiny friendly cartoon bat and a kind little girl under a big full moon, gentle and sweet, not scary
a friendly smiling jack-o-lantern pumpkin with a happy face in a moonlit pumpkin patch, cheerful and cute, not scary
a cozy castle bedroom sleepover at night, friendly kids in sleeping bags with glowing lanterns and stars out the window
